docket_entries.description: (3) NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,605.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY RANDY MONTESANO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT TONY DUONG, IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $20,000.00 US CURRENCY PLUS ALL INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
